name: Attention Activism 201 [Online] (Session 2/3)

name: Cage Match PLAYOFFS: Spaghetti vs. The Prophecy, Live and LIVESTREAMED!
description: IT'S THE PLAYOFFS! Two Improv Teams Fight for the Future! The World’s Most Dangerous Improv Show! In the year 2121, the World Government has outlawed LONG-FORM IMPROV. The very thing that will be the weapon for their downfall. Led…

name: Motion Graphics with After Effects
description: Adobe After Effects is the industry standard for creating dynamic motion graphics and video effects compositing. This online course covers the basics of the After Effects interface, text and layer animation, chroma-keying, video effects, keyframing, compositing, and outputting to Premiere.

name: Facts Machine: Science, Comedy & Trivia!
description: Facts Machine is a science comedy show and trivia showdown for the curious and the laugh-inclined. This month features a year-end science comedy holiday party with guest scientists, comedians, and storytellers.

name: Guyscrappers, Billy Plastered, Darlin’
description: A night of rock and roll with Guyscrappers, Billy Plastered, and Darlin’.

name: Rush
description: The Moth StorySLAM is an open-mic storytelling competition in which anyone can share a true, personal, 5-minute story on the night's theme. Sign up for a chance to tell a story or sit back and enjoy the show! Tonight’s theme is…RUSH: Prepare a five-m...

name: Folk Americana Night
description: Enjoy heartfelt performances of folk and Americana music. Artists will share stories and melodies that evoke tradition and emotion.

name: BRIC Podcast Intensive: 2026 Cohort
description: This intensive course guides participants through all stages of podcast creation, from writing to editing. Selected Brooklyn residents will produce their own podcast episode, developing skills in storytelling and production.

name: A Conversation with Neil Gaiman
description: Neil Gaiman will be in conversation with a special guest to discuss his latest work and career. This event is ticketed.

name: Hannah Berner: None Of My Business Tour
description: Comedian Hannah Berner brings her "None Of My Business" tour.

name: Ron Milewicz: Beside Still Waters

description: A free open-house every Thursday in January featuring distillery tours, barrel room tastings, and live DJs spinning into the night. Guests can mingle with seasonal pours and enjoy discounted cocktails at the Gatehouses.

name: Ozone: Attack of the Redneck Mutants
description: Small-town life collapses into a grotesque carnival in this 1986 horror cult classic. Followed by a Q&A with director Matt Devlen.
short_name: Ozone: Attack of the Redneck Mutants

name: sine cera, Skyler Skjelset, The Bird Calls

short_name: sine cera, Skyler Skjelset, The Bird Calls

description: A political comedy show featuring local comedians and performers. This event provides a space for members to relax and connect through humor and performance.

description: Information session for the Parsons New York Summer Intensive Studies program for pre-college students. The webinar covers application processes, academic curriculum, and the campus experience.

name: Alligator Comedy
description: A weekly stand-up comedy showcase featuring local Brooklyn talent and touring comics. Enjoy a free personal pizza with your drink while watching the show.

name: Webinar — How Food, Mood, and Mindfulness Transform Wellbeing
description: Author Elizabeth Borelli reveals how to unlock better moods and lasting energy directly from your kitchen. This webinar provides a simple framework for transforming your physical and mental health through nutrition and mindfulness.

name: Moynihan Station: Free Beer Tasting
description: Grab a complimentary taste of some Threes Brewing favorites at our Moynihan Station location. It's the perfect way to sample new beers while passing through the train hall.
